title: Two Weeks HUD
description: Want your game to look like a famous third person battle royale shooter? Look no further!
body:
# Two Weeks
*A Minecraft mod specifically made to replicate the Heads Up Display (HUD) of Minecraft to look like a popular third person shooter.*

Work in Progress features:
- Configuration
- Air meter
- Compatibility with mods like AppleSkin

---
### Please refrain from using the versions prior to 1.0.0. Any usage of said versions will not be supported if issues arise.
